pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh target paths and verifier.py logic.
Confirmed via verifier.py script which explicitly searches for 22.2 (or 11.1) parameter values in the output SLVS file.
Confirmed via verifier.py script which explicitly searches for 3.2 (or 1.6) parameter values in the output SLVS file.
Confirmed via verifier.py script which explicitly searches for 31.04 (or 15.52) parameter values in the output SLVS file.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real-world tutorial file ('base.slvs') downloaded directly from the official SolveSpace project website (box-parts.zip). The task explicitly dictates a set of CAD parameters (22.2mm center diameter, 3.2mm mount diameter, 31.04mm spacing) to define a NEMA 17 mounting pattern. These exact geometric parameter values are rigorously verified against the internal plaintext nodes of the final modified SLVS file via verifier.py, and the expected SLVS/STL output paths are enforced via export scripts.
